task_completion.description: Verify the Incident Template name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Network Outage Report' entered into the Template Name field in the ServiceDesk Plus template creation/edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subject field is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Network Outage - [Location]' entered into the Subject field of the template.

task_completion.description: Verify the Description field contains all required prompts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the description text area. It must contain the phrases: 'Affected location/floor:', 'Number of users impacted:', 'Time outage was first noticed:', and 'Symptoms observed:'.

task_completion.description: Verify Priority, Urgency, and Impact fields are set to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dropdown menus or fields for Priority, Urgency, and Impact. Priority and Urgency must be set to 'High'. Impact must be set to 'High' or 'Affects Business'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Category field is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Category dropdown menu or field. It must be set to 'Network'.

task_completion.description: Verify the template was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Template added successfully') or the 'Network Outage Report' appearing in the list of saved Incident Templates.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the ServiceDesk Plus application interface, not a local text editor, mock HTML file, or note-taking app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required fields and descriptions must be entered into the actual ServiceDesk Plus form fields, not just written out in a generic text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Template Name: 'Network Outage Report'. Expected Subject: 'Network Outage - [Location]'. Required Description Substrings: 'Affected location', 'users impacted', 'Time outage', 'Symptoms observed'. Expected Priority: 'High'. Expected Category: 'Network'.
